outcome_record.event_name: T20 World Cup 2026 Final — India vs Australia

prediction.pre_match_note: T20 WORLD CUP FINAL 2026. India vs Australia. India modifier × 1.40 (not vs Pakistan, so not × 2.00). Final stage weight × 2.00. If India wins: CDI = 45 × 2.50 × 1.40 = 157.5 day CDI. Highest cricket fan sentiment event of the cycle. Evening match — dew risk flag active.

outcome.final_score: India won by 4 wickets (chasing, dew advantage realised)

calibration_flags.notes: T20 WORLD CUP FINAL CALIBRATION RECORD. India modifier × 1.40 validated. Dew factor: India chasing successfully → dew advantage for batting second confirmed in highest-stakes match. Fan sentiment CDI: if 157.5 days predicted, one of the longest commercial windows ever. India wins T20 WC = structural LTUI event for cricket fan tokens.
